task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is being used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sample Order Lines' in the Data Elements pane on the left or in the dataset tab at the bottom/top of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Tech Revenue' calculated column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Tech Revenue' listed under 'My Calculations' in the Data Elements pane, or visible in an open calculation editor window.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Furniture Revenue' calculated column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Furniture Revenue' listed under 'My Calculations' in the Data Elements pane, or visible in an open calculation editor window.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Scatter Plot visualization has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a scatter plot chart (points distributed on an X/Y axis) on the main project canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the Scatter Plot is configured with the correct axes and category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Grammar pane (usually next to the canvas) or the chart axes: X-axis must be 'Tech Revenue', Y-axis must be 'Furniture Revenue', and Category or Color must be 'Customer Name'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cross_Category_Analysis' in the title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window, or in a Save As dialog box.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with menus, panes, and canvas being actively used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the visualization is genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The scatter plot should appear within the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas area with its native UI elements, not as a standalone image opened in a picture viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected outcomes into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad) open containing the expected column names or filename as a shortcut to bypass actual software interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected dataset: 'Sample Order Lines'. Expected calculated columns: 'Tech Revenue' and 'Furniture Revenue'. Expected visualization: Scatter plot with Tech Revenue on X-axis, Furniture Revenue on Y-axis, and Customer Name as Category/Color. Expected filename: 'Cross_Category_Analysis.dva' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.
